images.name: khadija_warmup
images.prompt: Premium, cute aesthetic anime illustration of a modest Muslim girl in a pink gym, wearing a full modest pink and black athletic abaya, a matching hijab, and a full face niqab (نقاب) covering her face except her big cute anime eyes. She has a beautiful little pink rose flower attached on her head (on the side of her hijab/niqab). The background is a clean modern pastel pink gym with soft rose-colored lighting and cute aesthetic fitness equipment. The girl is standing tall, doing gentle neck tilts and rotating her shoulders with arms slightly raised in a gentle warm-up. Clean anime key visual, highly detailed, vibrant colors, cute and premium.
